title: Build release runtime bridge before AOT e2e tests

source.subject: fix(ci): build release runtime bridge before AOT e2e tests

body:
## What shipped

AOT e2e workflows build the **release** runtime bridge artifact before running tests, matching local developer and production codegen paths.

## Source commit

Repository **`beskid`** · commit `a3d7cee`

> fix(ci): build release runtime bridge before AOT e2e tests

## Completed

2026-05-23 (catalog cutoff window).
